SEARCH
Package model

Interface AdministratorDAO

All Known Implementing Classes:
DBImplementationAdministrator
public interface AdministratorDAO
Data Access Object interface for managing Administrator entities.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    checkAdminExists(String name)
    Checks if an administrator exists by calling the checkAdminExists method with the provided name and returns the result.
    boolean
    checkUser(Administrator user)
    Checks if an administrator exists by calling the checkAdminExists method with the provided name and returns the result.
    boolean
    deleteAdministrator(String name)
    Deletes an administrator by calling the deleteAdministrator method with the provided name and returns the result.
    Administrator
    getAdministratorByName(String name)
    Retrieves an administrator by name by calling the getAdministratorByName method with the provided name and returns the result.
    List<Administrator>
    getAllAdministrators()
    Retrieves a list of all administrators by calling the getAllAdministrators method
    boolean
    insertUser(Administrator user)
    Inserts a new administrator by calling the insertUser method with the provided administrator object and returns the result.
    boolean
    updateAdministrator(Administrator admin)
    Updates an administrator by calling the updateAdministrator method with the provided administrator object and returns the result.
    boolean
    updatePassword(String adminName, String newPassword)
    Updates the password of an administrator by calling the updatePassword method with the provided administrator name and new password and returns the result.
